expectations.text: No new article is created without user confirmation
expectations.evidence: No new .md article files in outputs/ directory; response.txt only contains assessment and question for user

expectations.text: The skill reads KB-REFERENCE-MAP or existing SURV articles before deciding
expectations.evidence: Response references RC-SURV-07 section details (Section 3, 4.4, 9, 10) showing the article was read, and identifies RC-SURV-03 as alternative target

expectations.text: The routing decision is specific — names which article(s) the content belongs in
expectations.evidence: Routes to RC-SURV-07 Section 10 (gotcha) and RC-SURV-03 (auto-continue), with section-level specificity

expectations.text: The skill asks the user a question before proceeding
expectations.evidence: Response has a 'QUESTION FOR USER' section with 3 specific clarifying questions before proceeding
